---
title: "testsite-deletelater"
---

this is a test website

create a repo on github as usual

clone to computer

run `quarto create-project --type website` in terminal

restart r session

open up project again

you should see build and git tabs

run `touch .nojekyll` in terminal

add `output-dir: docs` to `_quarto.yml`

build website on build tab > render website
